entries.title: Articles admin index.
entries.notes: Requires Blog plus its required Capell extensions installed, package migrations, and seeded draft/published articles with sites, layouts, URLs, translations, and tags.
entries.useCase: An editor reviews the article queue, publish windows, language coverage, and article status before editing content.

entries.title: Create/edit article form.
entries.notes: Requires seeded sites, article type, layouts, and tags so relationship fields are populated. The batch harness could not complete extension install until required dependency extensions were marked installed.
entries.useCase: An editor creates or updates an article with publishing windows, metadata, layout selection, media, and taxonomy.

entries.title: Article health dashboard widget.
entries.notes: Capture when the host dashboard registers the Blog widget implementation and seeded articles include complete/incomplete metadata states.
entries.useCase: An editor sees whether articles are missing metadata, tags, media, translations, or publish settings.

entries.title: Top pages dashboard widget.
entries.notes: Requires the host dashboard to register the widget and seeded article/page traffic data from the analytics package used by the host.
entries.useCase: An editor identifies which articles or blog pages are drawing the most visits.

entries.title: Traffic chart dashboard widget.
entries.notes: Requires the host dashboard to register the widget and seeded time-series traffic data.
entries.useCase: An editor reviews recent traffic trends for blog content from the dashboard.

entries.title: Blog page frontend output.
entries.notes: Requires seeded blog landing page, published articles, layout content, URLs, and navigation. Verify public output contains no authoring markers or admin/editor URLs.
entries.useCase: A visitor browses the public blog landing page and sees published article listings.

entries.title: Archive page frontend output.
entries.notes: Requires archive pages created by setup/demo commands and articles with visible dates across at least two months.
entries.useCase: A visitor opens a monthly archive and sees articles filtered to that archive period.

entries.title: Tag page frontend output.
entries.notes: Requires seeded tags attached to published articles and tag page URLs from the blog setup flow.
entries.useCase: A visitor opens a tag page and sees published articles associated with that tag.

entries.title: Article page block output.
entries.notes: Requires a seeded article page with author, date, tag, media, and related metadata. Capture as anonymous public output.
entries.useCase: A visitor reads a public article block with the article metadata needed for scanning and navigation.

entries.title: Article tags block output.
entries.notes: Requires seeded tags with at least one published article per tag. Capture as anonymous public output.
entries.useCase: A visitor uses the tag block to navigate between related article topics.
